# itemIdentifier

**Instance Property**

The unique identifier for the item that changed.

## Declaration

```swift
var itemIdentifier: NSFileProviderItemIdentifier { get }
```

## Accessing the Operation’s Data

- **item**: A description of the item that changed.
- **side**: The location where the change occurred.

items.description: A description of the item that changed.
items.name: item

items.description: The location where the change occurred.
items.name: side
